Aries. Count so many signs from the one Occupied by the
lord of the Sth house. When Saturn comes to this sign during
transit, death may overtake the subject. [Suppose Cancer to
be the Lagna whose lord, the Moon, is in Leo Arhsa. This is
the Sth Sign from Aries. If the lord of the Sth house i.e.
Saturn, is in Aquarius itself, count five signs from it. You get
Gemini as the required sign].
(vii) The month of demise is got from the Sign which is the
sum of the longitudes of Mandi and the ascendant. The idea is
that when the Sun comes in transit to this sign and Arhsa, it
will occur. The Arhsa will indicate what part of the solar
month it is.
(viii) The Moon will occupy at death that sign which is
represented by the sum of the longitudes of Mandi and the Moon.
(ix) The time of death or the ascendant of demise will be the
sign represented by the sum of the longitudes of the ascendant,
Nandi and the Moon.
(x) Find out the Navariisa, Dvadasariisa and decanate
